extract-download-urls-of-linuxacademy.content:
# [linuxacademy-download-chrome](https://github.com/neotan/linuxacademy-download-chrome)

A JavaScript for extracting videos (.m3u8) and subtitles (.vtt) URLs from
linuxacademy.com

## Usage

1. Make sure `ffmpeg.exe` and `wget.exe` are installed and set in the `path` of
   OS, i.e. can get info. by running `ffmpeg -version` and `wget --version` in
   terminal or cmd.
1. Log-in and open a course, e.g.
   https://linuxacademy.com/cp/modules/view/id/245
1. Run the script in the `Console` or `Sources` tab of `Chrome DevTools` (open
   it by pressing `F12`)
1. The result will be shown in the console, including:
   - cmd for downloading `Videos` with 'ffmpeg'
   - cmd for downloading `Subtitles` with 'wget'
   - cmd for marking all `Lessons` completed
1. Copy and save one of above cmd to a bash file, e.g. `get.sh`
1. Execute `./get.sh` to start downloading

## Note

`&&` in the cmd means executing commands **line by line (Recommanded)**, revise
it to `&` will execute commands in **parallel**.

meta.title: Extract video and subtitle URLs from linuxacademy.com with Chrome DevTools + ffmpeg + wget

greasemonkey-script-for-baidu-netdisk.content:
## Description

A GreaseMonkey script renaming files on web-based version of baidu netdisk

## Usage

1. Install [Tampermonkey](https://www.tampermonkey.net/)
1. Install
   [this script](https://greasyfork.org/en/scripts/398489-baidu-netdisk-rename)
1. Open pan.baidu.com/disk
1. A renaming tool will show on the top of file list
1. Input what you want to search and replace
1. Click `Rename` button

### Screen shots

https://res.cloudinary.com/ntme/image/upload/v1650854296/blog/baidu-netdisk-rename1.png

https://res.cloudinary.com/ntme/image/upload/v1650854296/blog/baidu-netdisk-rename2.png

meta.title: Greasemonkey script for renaming file names on Baidu Netdisk 百度網盤的重命名小工具

greasemonkey-script-for-cost-of-living-o.content:
## Description

A GreaseMonkey script for visualizing multiple cities' data from
www.numbeo.com/cost-of-living/

## Usage

1. Install Tampermonkey
1. Install
   [this script](https://greasyfork.org/en/scripts/395215-numbeo-cost-of-living-comparison)
1. Open www.numbeo.com or its sub routes
1. Will see Charts and Table be attached on the page
1. Change the city names(split them with comma) in Cities field
1. Press Enter key or click the Submit button

## Chart

https://res.cloudinary.com/ntme/image/upload/v1650682544/blog/numbeo-cost-of-living-comparison-1_nqbu3h.png

## Table

https://res.cloudinary.com/ntme/image/upload/v1650682549/blog/numbeo-cost-of-living-comparison-2_fsxqwv.png

meta.title: Greasemonkey script for Cost of Living data of Numbeo.com comparison

hackintosh-devices.content:
開發 Android 可以用任何主流 OS (Windows, Linux 或者 OSX (發音：OS ten))，這些 OS
上都有相應的 IDE 和 Compilation Env.，但是做 iOS 開發“只能”在 Apple 獨有的 OSX
上做，由于 OSX 以及 Mac 電腦的的封閉性和獨特性，並不像裝 Windows 那樣隨意買幾坨
硬件攢台 PC 就能跑得起來，因為這些硬件在 OSX 上大多都沒有相應的驅動（硬件廠家沒
為 OSX 開發驅動）。

但是，
從[OSX 10.6 Snow Leopard](http://www.cocoachina.com/apple/20130119/5572.html)開
始，OSX 的所有代碼已經完全撇除對 IBM Power 系列 CPU 的支持，轉向了 Intel，這就為
黑蘋果（Hackintosh）的誕生提供了可能性。

要攢黑蘋果，選購硬件的原則只有一個
：**`盡量與市面上已發售的Mac機器配備的硬件（芯片）型號相同（品牌不一定相同，比如下面列出的昂達顯卡）`。**

## 1. 組裝黑蘋果最關鍵的幾大件是：

1. CPU：必須 Intel CPU，農企的 U 會讓你很受傷
2. 主板：技嘉 Intel 芯片組的主板的安裝成功率最高
3. 顯卡：基于 1.的選擇，如果 CPU 集成了顯卡，通常都可以直接完美驅動；或者幹脆買
   N 記的顯卡。
4. 無線網卡/藍牙模塊： 參照下表

### 附上我的配置：

> - Intel 英特爾 Core 酷睿 i3-3220 盒裝 CPU 雙核四線程/3.3GHz/3MB 三級緩存
>   /LGA1155 該 CPU 集成的 HD2500 顯卡無法直驅，建議選擇其他型號，這便省下了顯卡
>   的錢，專心學習，少玩遊戲 XD
> - GIGABYTE 技嘉 GA-B75N 主板 Intel B75/LGA1155
> - 昂達(ONDA)GTX650 典範 1GD5 1058/5000MHz 1G/128bit DDR5 顯卡
> - 博通 BCM94352Z 無線網卡（帶藍牙 4.0，對藍牙設備很重要！！！） ，我的主板是坑
>   爹的 mini PCI-E 口，所以要搭
>   配[NGFF 轉 mini pci-e 轉接卡](https://item.taobao.com/item.htm?id=43414511551&_u=lc741n7a38)和[ipex4 代轉 ipex1 代底座轉接線](https://item.taobao.com/item.htm?id=528150772581&_u=lc741na3f4)才
>   能對接得上
>   。`並且一定記得買一對`[Wifunni 天線](http://item.taobao.com/item.htm?id=15968550189)，
>   不然接受不到信號。
> - 鼠標鍵盤 如無必要，盡可能用有線鼠標鍵盤，直接插機箱後面的 USB 口）
> - SilverStone 銀欣 SST-ST45SF 台式機電源
> - 海盜船(CORSAIR)追擊者 DDR3 1600 8GB \* 2 台式機內存
> - 希捷（Seagate）1TB ST1000DM003 7200 轉 64M SATA 6Gb/秒 分區後作 Windows 安裝
>   盤和主要數據儲存盤用
> - 閃迪(SanDisk) 至尊高速版-II 代 240G 固態硬盤
>   `用來裝OSX，最多買128G的就夠，因為SSD是耗材遲早要報銷的，一旦買太大了到時壞了心疼`

## 2. 開始安裝 OS X 和 Windows 雙系統

具體的安裝步驟我就不做搬運工了，請跟著 pcbeta
的[這個教程](http://bbs.pcbeta.com/viewthread-1542110-1-1.html)做，期間會遇到一
些問題，我嘗試給出以下幫助。

1. 遇到問題就[爬論壇](http://bbs.pcbeta.com/viewthread-1494831-1-1.html)找答案
   ，99%的問題在 pcbeta 都可以找到答案，當然你有梯子更好。
2. OS X Yosemite 10.10.3 鏡像解壓後裏面那個 5G 多的.dmg 就是真身，TransMac 要用
   的就是這個。
3. 坊間公認 Clover 引導比變色龍引導要穩定，也最接近真正的 Mac。
4. Mac 下怎麽顯示隱藏的 EFI 分區，並圖形化設置 Clover 參數呢？用 Clover
   Configurator。

暫時寫這麽多吧，有問題請留言，我看看有沒有遇到過能幫你的忙，不過實際上找 pcbeta
比找我更快。DIY 黑蘋果只適合不折騰會死星人，過程中充滿了一次又一次巨大的挫敗感。
但成功後，強大的配置和可擴展性又是正品 Mac 所無法比擬的。

當然，壕要麽直接 Mac Pro，要
麽[淘寶一個黑蘋果](http://s.taobao.com/search?q=%E9%BB%91%E8%8B%B9%E6%9E%9C&commend=all&ssid=s5-e&search_type=mall&sourceId=tb.index&spm=a1z02.1.6856637.d4910789)也
未嘗不可。

聲明：文中提到的所有軟件版權歸軟件所有者所有，本文僅供學習試驗參考，請在 24 小時
內刪除未經授權之軟件，建議購買經授權的正版軟件。

homebrew-npm-composer-srouces.content:
引自我在知乎上的回
答[Homebrew 有比較快的源（mirror）嗎？ - 知乎](https://www.zhihu.com/question/31360766/answer/132082951)

## 1. Homebrew

### A. 中科大的源（推薦）

(1).
[替換 homebrew-core 源](https://lug.ustc.edu.cn/wiki/mirrors/help/homebrew-core.git)

運行：

```bash
cd "$(brew --repo)/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core"
git remote set-url origin git://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/homebrew-core.git
```

(2).
[替換 Homebrew Bottles 源](https://lug.ustc.edu.cn/wiki/mirrors/help/homebrew-bottles)

```bash
echo 'export HOMEBREW_BOTTLE_DOMAIN=https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/homebrew-bottles' >> ~/.bash_profile
source ~/.bash_profile

brew update
```

### B. 清華的源

(1).
[替換 formula 索引的鏡像（即 brew update 時所更新內容）](https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/help/homebrew/)

運行：

```bash
cd "$(brew --repo)"
git remote set-url origin https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/git/homebrew/brew.git

cd "$(brew --repo)/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core"
git remote set-url origin https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/git/homebrew/homebrew-core.git

brew update
```

(2).
[替換 Homebrew 二進制預編譯包的鏡像](https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/help/homebrew-bottles/)

運行：

```bash
echo 'export HOMEBREW_BOTTLE_DOMAIN=https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/homebrew-bottles' >> ~/.bash_profile
source ~/.bash_profile
```

**PS: 如果運行 brew update 的時候報了這段 error，請使用中科大的源**

運行：

```bash
brew update
error: Packfile index for .git/objects/pack/pack-b2cf6673962afb44029dea036d48174efb361bc9.pack SHA1 mismatch
error: Unable to find a4d50c465d7398710f04022fafea080c7da83347 under https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/git/homebrew/homebrew-core.git
Cannot obtain needed object a4d50c465d7398710f04022fafea080c7da83347
error: fetch failed.
```

---

## 2. Composer

來自[Packagist / Composer 中國全量鏡像](http://pkg.phpcomposer.com/) 也有兩種方
式：

### A. 修改 composer 的全局配置文件（推薦方式）

打開命令行窗口（windows 用戶）或控制台（Linux、Mac 用戶）並執行如下命令：

```bash
composer config -g repo.packagist composer https://packagist.phpcomposer.com
```

### B. 修改當前項目的 composer.json 配置文件：

打開命令行窗口（windows 用戶）或控制台（Linux、Mac 用戶），進入你的項目的根目錄
（也就是 composer.json 文件所在目錄），執行如下命令：

```bash
composer config repo.packagist composer https://packagist.phpcomposer.com
```

上述命令將會在當前項目中的 composer.json 文件的末尾自動添加鏡像的配置信息（你也
可以自己手工添加）：

```json
"repositories": {
    "packagist": {
        "type": "composer",
        "url": "https://packagist.phpcomposer.com"
    }
}
```

---

## 3. npm

有永久和臨時兩種形式：

### A. 通過 config 命令作全局永久替換

運行：

```bash
npm config set registry https://registry.npm.taobao.org
npm info underscore
```

如果上面配置正確，這個 npm info 命令會有字符串顯示，如:

```bash
...
dist:
 { shasum: '4f3fb53b106e6097fcf9cb4109f2a5e9bdfa5022',
   size: 34172,
   noattachment: false,
   tarball: 'http://registry.npm.taobao.org/underscore/download/underscore-1.8.3.tgz' },
directories: {},
publish_time: 1427988774520 }
```

### B. 通過命令行臨時替換

運行：

```bash
npm --registry https://registry.npm.taobao.org info underscore
```

### C. 另一種臨時方法

運行：

```bash
SASS_BINARY_SITE=https://npm.taobao.org/mirrors/node-sass/ npm install -g node-sass
```

---

## 4. apm (Atom editor)

[Atom 官方說 apm 是基于 npm 的](https://github.com/atom/apm#relation-to-npm))，
所以可以使用上面淘寶的 npm 源。

編輯或新建文件`~/.atom/.apmrc`，加上這段：

```bash
registry=https://registry.npm.taobao.org/
strict-ssl=false
```

> 可選項，給 apm 加上代理：`apm config set proxy http://127.0.0.1:1080`

另外，Windows 版的 Atom 會使用自帶的 node.exe，而忽略你自行安裝的是哪個版本，為
了統一 node 版本，可以將 Atom 自帶的 node 和 npm 都替換掉：

用 Administrator 模式啓動 CMD，然後：

```bash
d:
cd "D:\Program Files\ATOM\resources\app\apm\bin"
node.exe -v
rename node.exe node.exe.original
mklink node.exe "D:\Program Files\node\node.exe"
node.exe -v
rename npm.cmd npm.cmd.original
mklink npm.cmd "D:\Program Files\node\npm.cmd"
cd ..
npm -v
```

安裝個插件試試，看看有沒有快些：

```bash
apm i sync-settings
```

另外，如果你用的是 Windows Git Bash，裝好 Atom 後運行 apm，python 等命令是會提
示`bash: apm: command not found`的，解決辦法很簡單，在 Git Bash 裏運行：

```bash
cd ~
echo "alias apm='winpty apm.cmd'" >> .bashrc
echo "alias python='winpty python.exe'" >> .bashrc
source .bashrc
```

meta.title: 用國內的源（Source）替換官方源，提高下載速度（包括Homebrew, npm 和 Composer 等）

js-loop-benchmark.content:
## Benchmark

[https://jsben.ch/EAlKw](https://jsben.ch/EAlKw)

## Result

https://res.cloudinary.com/ntme/image/upload/v1650853816/blog/js-loops-chrome.png

https://res.cloudinary.com/ntme/image/upload/v1650853845/blog/js-loops-edge-2.png

https://res.cloudinary.com/ntme/image/upload/v1650853800/blog/js-loops-firefox.png

## Codes

### Execute before every test

```js
var arr = Array(1000000).fill(null)
var dosmth
```

### `for` - Uncached length

```js
for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
  dosmth = arr[i]
}
```

### `for` - Cached length

```js
let len = arr.length
for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
  dosmth = arr[i]
}
```

### `for.. of`

```js
for (let val of arr) {
  dosmth = val
}
```

### `while` - Uncached length

```js
let i = 0

while (i < arr.length) {
  dosmth = arr[i]
  ++i
}
```

### `while` - Cached length

```js
let i = 0
const len = arr.length

while (i < len) {
  dosmth = arr[i]
  ++i
}
```

### `forEach`

```js
arr.forEach(el => (dosmth = el))
```

### `map`

```js
arr.map(el => (dosmth = el))
```

leetcode-language-switch.content:
Switching between English and Chinese site and logging down question URLs
easily.

https://github.com/neotan/leetcode-languages-switch-chrome-extension

## Installation

1. Download this repo by clicking upper-right `Download ZIP` under the `Clone`
   dropdown menu
2. Extract the `.zip` file as a folder e.g.
   `leetcode-languages-switch-chrome-extension-master`
3. Open your Chrome > type `chrome://extensions/` in the address bar
4. Turn on `Developer mode` at the upper right
5. Click `Load unpacked`, and point to above unzipped folder
6. A new plugin will be installed, shows an computer icon with a green tick

## Usage

Open [leetcode.com](leetcode.com) or [leetcode-cn.com](leetcode-cn.com), you
will see several buttons at the page header

1. `Cn` or `En`: switching between Chinese and English sites
2. `Copy`: copy current URL
3. `Collect`: log current URL into localStorage
4. `Uncollect`: remove current URL from localStorage
5. `Get collected`: Copy all collected URLs

meta.title: A leetcode languages switch Chrome extension

padding-margin-top-bottom-percentage.content:
## Scenario When you specify vertical properties (e.g. padding/margin-top and padding/margin-bottom) to a box is container in its parent box as below: While you are resizing the **width** of browser window, you will see the height of yellow box is changing. ```html
.container 100% * 400
.inner 300 * 200
``` You probably noticed that the inner's padding/margin-top and padding/margin-bottom as a percentage will always related to its parent's **width**, instead of parent's height, is it a bug of W3C? Actually, NO, refer the W3C spec: - [w3.org > 8.3 Margin properties](https://www.w3.org/TR/CSS2/box.html#margin-properties) - [w3.org > 8.4 Padding properties](https://www.w3.org/TR/CSS2/box.html#padding-properties) > Percentages: refer to **width** of containing block ## Why the W3C spec is written like this? Unknown so far, but some points were raised by [Ryan Kinal > w3c - Why are margin/padding percentages in CSS always calculated against width? - Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/a/11004839) are interesting and seems resonable. > Element height is defined by the height of the children. If an element has > padding-top: 10% (relative to parent height), that is going to affect the > height of the parent. Since the height of the child is dependent on the height > of the parent, and the height of the parent is dependent on the height of the > child, we'll either have inaccurate height, or an infinite loop. Sure, this > only affects the case where offset parent === parent, but still. It's an odd > case that is difficult to resolve.

meta.title: Why padding/margin-top and padding/margin-bottom as a percentage related to the parent's width?

preventing-overlap-by-customized-content.content:
## Scenario

Imagine that

1.  Your e-shop website allows users to publish their products(i.e. text, img)
    by themselves, even input some CSS to decorate the content.
2.  The published product will be show in a individual detail page with a rating
    (e.g. stars) on the top of the page.
3.  A foxy and technical users want to overlap the rating div with 5 stars by
    writing a piece of CSS.

like this:

<script
  async
  src="//jsfiddle.net/neotan12/2Lonqx2L/6/embed/html,css,result/"
></script>

## Solutions

How to disable the cheating? We do have some options:

### 1. Add a max z-index value to true-ratting div?

Nope!

The [normal-flow](https://www.w3.org/TR/CSS2/visuren.html#normal-flow) will
still put the `content`(and its `fake-ratting` div) div on top of `header` (and
its child `true-rating` div):

<script
  async
  src="//jsfiddle.net/neotan12/wyoxxfb4/1/embed/html,css,result/"
></script>

Btw the max z-index values of popular browser were indicated by
[Behnam Mohammadi & Gust van de Wal - Stackoverflow](https://stackoverflow.com/a/25461690)
FYR:

| **Browser**          | **Max z─index value** | **When exceeded, value changes to: ** |
| :------------------- | :-------------------- | :------------------------------------ |
| Firefox 0 - 2        | 2147483647            | element disappears                    |
| Firefox 3            | 2147483647            | 0                                     |
| Firefox 4+           | 2147483647            | 2147483647                            |
| Safari 0 - 3         | 16777271              | 16777271                              |
| Safari 4+            | 2147483647            | 2147483647                            |
| Internet Explorer 6+ | 2147483647            | 2147483647                            |
| Chrome 29+           | 2147483647            | 2147483647                            |
| Opera 9+             | 2147483647            | 2147483647                            |

### 2. Separate `header` and `content` div into 2 `iFrame`

Yes, it will work well, because they were isolated with 2 different html files.
But
[The iFrame Is Evil! - RWBlackburn LLC](http://www.rwblackburn.com/iframe-evil/),
so it just a way, not good one.

### 3. Add z-index values to relative div

WHAT!!?? You may have been confused. Yes, trust me `z-index` is the good way,
let's check it out:

1. Wrap `header` and `content` div with  `header-wrapper` and `content-wrapper`,
   and set them `position: relative`. **These 2 wrapper should be the part of
   your page template, i.e. don't allow uses to change them**.
2. Give the `header-wrapper` div a big `z-index` (e.g. 1000) and
   `content-wrapper` dive a small `z-index` (e.g. 1) .

That's it, every thing work well and don't have to touch any users customized
content, and users cannot hack the `true-rating` now.

<script async src="//jsfiddle.net/neotan12/oe3pezcw/"></script>

meta.title: How to prevent overlap by customized content(e.g. div and img)?

react-developers-onboarding-checklist.content:
https://twitter.com/housecor/status/1587072435689603075

模板字符串像是有超能力的普通字符串：

```tsx mark=10 
const greeting = 'Hello'
const subject = 'World'
console.log(`${greeting} ${subject}!`) // Hello World!

// 與此相同:
console.log(greeting + ' ' + subject + '!')

// 在 React 裡:
function Box({ className, ...props }) {
  return <div className={`box ${className}`} {...props} />
}
```

[MDN: Template Literals](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Template_literals)

## 1. GENERAL

1. [ ] Is it a greenfield project?
1. [ ] Who is the team? 
1. [ ] What would the first 30 days look like for me?

## 2. COMMUNICATION

1. [ ] Real-Time? 
    * Slack, MS Teams, Discord
1. [ ] Task Manager
    * JIRA, Trello 
1. [ ] Pull Requests
    * GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket
1. [ ] Email
1. [ ] Meetings
    * Stand-ups
    * Frequency

## 3. WORKFLOW

1. [ ] Do we do Kanban, Scrum, or Power Yoga?
1. [ ] Do we do code reviews?
1. [ ] Do we do feature branches?

## 4. API

1. [ ] What kind of API does your backend offer?
1. [ ] Where do I find the API documentation?

## 5. UI/UX

1. [ ] Should I make it look good or pixel perfect?⚠
1. [ ] Where do I get the mockups from? 
1. [ ] What color scheme, fonts, and assets should I use? 
1. [ ] Are we using in-house icons?

## 6. FRONTEND

1. [ ] Do you have already plans of which libraries you want to use?
1. [ ] How much customization is needed?
1. [ ] Are we using a state management library?
1. [ ] How do we fetch data?
    * React-Query
1. [ ] Should we use TypeScript?
1. [ ] How much should be tested?⚠

simdajs-es6-alternitive-of-ramdajs.content:
# [Simda.js](https://www.npmjs.com/package/simda)

A light-weight alternative (in ES6+) of [Ramda.js](https://ramdajs.com/)

### Installation

```shell
npm i simda
```

### Usage

```js
import * as S from 'simda'

const newObj = S.assocPath(['a', 1, 'c'], 999)({ a: [{ b: 111 }] })
console.log(newObj) // => {a:[{b:111},{c:999}]}
```

ssl-tls.content:
## 1. 概覽

在構建網絡應用，特別是暴露在 internet 中的應用時，通常都會使用 SSL/TLS 協議增強
數據傳輸的安全性，其結構如下：

https://res.cloudinary.com/ntme/image/upload/v1650851437/blog/SSL-TLS-Structure_zlzpwj.png

## 2. 握手協議 Shakehand

其中最重要，最複雜（未必是被理解最清楚的）的是握手協議 Shakehand。本來想找一張清
晰易懂的 Shakehand 流程圖，看到 wikipedia
的[這張圖](http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/a/ae/SSL_handshake_with_two_way_authentication_with_certificates.svg 'SSL/TLS Shakehand')很
好，有人持續更新它，但就是字體太小，眼睛都瞪瞎了*\_*，索性操起超超超強大的
[DRAW.io](https://www.draw.io/)（需先科學上網，Why?），從新做輪子，期間參考
了[《圖解密碼技術》](http://www.amazon.cn/%E5%9B%BE%E4%B9%A6/dp/B00Q535R6I)的相
關章節，加入了便于理解的對話。希望這圖對大家有幫助。

另外，大家可以留意一下 Client 和 Server 證書（cert.）的交換時機（Phase 2 和 3）
，這就是我們平時在客戶端和服務器端所安裝的證書的使用時刻，這裏是典型的雙向證書驗
證，通常在搭建 SSL/TLS 應用的時候都這麽做，目的是確保雙方都是可信的（因為雙方都
安裝了某 [CA](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Certificate_authority) 的 root cert，
且雙方的 cert 都由這個 CA 所 trust，所 issue）。

https://res.cloudinary.com/ntme/image/upload/v1650849306/blog/SSL-TLS-Shakehand_qvlyfz.png

握手完成後，Client 和 Server 端就會使用應用數據協議和 TLS 記錄協議進行加密通信。
從結果來看，握手協議完成了下列操作：

1. Client 端獲得了 Server 端的合法公鑰，完成了 Server 認證。
2. Server 獲得了客戶端的合法公鑰，完成了 Client 認證 （當需要客戶端認證時）。
3. Client 和 Server 生成了消息認證碼(MAC：Message Authentication Code)中使用的共
   享密鑰。
4. Client 和 Server 生成了加密通信中使用的共享密鑰（上圖的 MS）。

## 3. 解答幾個網上常見的問題：

### 1. SSL 和 TLS 的區別

TLS 是 SSL 的繼承者，SSL3.0，之後的 TLS1.0 相當于 “SSL3.1”。

| Version           |                      公布日期 | Remark                                                            |
| :---------------- | ----------------------------: | :---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| SSL 1.0           |               Netscape 未公布 |                                                                   |
| SSL 2.0           |                          1995 |                                                                   |
| SSL 3.0           |                          1996 |                                                                   |
| TLS 1.0 (SSL 3.1) |                          1999 | 為了兼容 SSL，包括可以降級到 SSL 3.0 的實現，這削弱了連接的安全性 |
| TLS 1.1 (SSL 3.2) |                          2006 |                                                                   |
| TLS 1.2 (SSL 3.3) |                          2008 |                                                                   |
| TLS 1.3           | TBD，至 Apr 2015 還是草案狀態 |                                                                   |

### 2. TLS (Transport Layer Security) 是傳輸層協議嗎？

不是。它是一套應用層協議：

> **[TLS](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/c):** In the Internet Protocol Suite, TLS
> and SSL encrypt the data of network connections in the
> [application layer](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Application_layer). In OSI
> model equivalences, TLS/SSL is initialized at layer 5
> ([session layer](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Session_layer)) and works at
> layer 6 (the
> [presentation layer](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Presentation_layer)).[citation
>
> > needed]

它在會話層被初始化，然後工作在表示層。另外，不僅是 HTTP，其他應用層協議（例如
：FTP, SMTP 等）都可以使用 TLS，而常見的 UDP 使用的是
[DTLS](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Datagram_Transport_Layer_Security)。

### 3. SSL 和 TLS，應該選用哪個作為服務器端的安全策略的一部分？

盡量用最新的 TLS 1.2，它修複了之前版本的許多漏洞。當前大部分 WS（Web Server）産
品都已經支持，如
從[Nginx](http://nginx.org/en/docs/http/configuring_https_servers.html)，[Tomcat 6.0.43](http://tomcat.apache.org/tomcat-6.0-doc/ssl-howto.html)和[IIS 7.5](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Internet_Information_Services#History)開
始。即使你當前用的 WS 不支持 TLS 1.2，也盡可能使用支持 TLS 1.0 的 WS 版本，並
且**禁用 Client 和 Server 端的 SSL 3.0**，因為去年底爆出的
[POODLE 安全缺陷](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/POODLE)說明僅僅升級到 TLS 1.x 是
不夠的。

> **利用該缺陷進行攻擊主要分兩步：**

> 1. 攻擊者先通
>    過[Version rollback attacks](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Transport_Layer_Security#Version_rollback_attacks)使
>    TLS shakehand 失敗，C/S 就會協商降級使用 SSL 3.0 再次 shakehand。
> 2. 然後就可以[利用 POODLE 進行攻擊](http://drops.wooyun.org/papers/3194)啦。

有鑒于此，在 POODLE 缺陷被證實後，主流浏覽器大廠已經在自家産品中強制使用 TLS 並
禁用了 SSL 3.0，杜絕 rollback 回 SSL 3.0。如果你的浏覽器已經禁用 SSL 3.0 的話，
浏覽只支持 SSL 3.0 的網站會看到類似的警告：

https://res.cloudinary.com/ntme/image/upload/v1650851550/blog/SSL3-unsupported-warning_qokyzw.png

### 4. 怎麽知道我用的浏覽器和某網站支持什麽版本的 SSL/TLS 協議？

- **簡單的**
- [服務端 SSL 支持檢測](https://www.ssllabs.com/ssltest/index.html)
- [本地 SSLv3 支持檢測](https://www.ssllabs.com/ssltest/viewMyClient.html)
- **複雜的**
- Linux/OSX: `nmap --script ssl-enum-ciphers -p 443 www.alipay.com`
- Windows: [Zenmap](https://nmap.org/zenmap/)

**Output**

```
username@yourhostname:[~]
nmap --script ssl-enum-ciphers -p 443 www.alipay.com
Starting Nmap 6.40 ( http://nmap.org ) at 2015-05-05 08:36 HKT
Nmap scan report for www.alipay.com (110.75.142.111)
Host is up (0.091s latency).
DNS record for 110.75.142.111: host-111.alipay.com
PORT    STATE SERVICE
443/tcp open  https
| ssl-enum-ciphers:
|   SSLv3:
|     ciphers:
|       TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA - strong
|       TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA - strong
|       TLS_RSA_WITH_RC4_128_SHA - strong
|     compressors:
|       NULL
~~~~~~~~~~（此處省略多行）~~~~~~~~~~
|   TLSv1.2:
|     ciphers:
|       TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256 - strong
|       TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256 - strong
|       TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384 - strong
|       TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384 - strong
|       TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA - strong
|       TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256 - strong
|       TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256 - strong
|       TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA - strong
|       TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA256 - strong
|       TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384 - strong
|       TLS_RSA_WITH_RC4_128_SHA - strong
|     compressors:
|       NULL
|_  least strength: strong
Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 3.82 seconds
```

### 5. 為什麽連 alipay.com 這樣的網站還保留 SSL 3.0？不是說 SSL3.0 不安全了嗎？

問得好！它不但保留了 SSL 3.0，還保留了已經不安全的 RC4 加密算法（速度極快的算法
，8bit 的機器都能很快算出僞隨機數(圖上的 RNc)）。

這不是阿裏的疏忽，而
是[像許多網站那樣](https://blog.cloudflare.com/the-web-is-world-wide-or-who-still-needs-rc4/)想
兼容那些舊版浏覽器（雖然的數量已經很少很少），比如像我 XP 裏那萬年不升級的 IE6
和老舊
的[功能手機 Candy bar phone](http://www.techopedia.com/definition/24225/candy-bar-phone)的
內置浏覽器。
